name: Emoji Trail
description: Makes random emojis fly out from your cursor as you move the mouse. Each one floats up, spins, and fades away.

name: Spinning Images
description: Makes every image on the page spin and wobble at random speeds. Click any image to stop just that one.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){if(window._spinOn){document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(function(i){i.style.animation='';});var s=document.getElementById('_spinStyle');if(s)s.remove();window._spinOn=false;alert('Spinning OFF');return;}var style=document.createElement('style');style.id='_spinStyle';style.textContent='@keyframes wacky{0%{transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1)}25%{transform:rotate(180deg) scale(1.3)}50%{transform:rotate(360deg) scale(0.7)}75%{transform:rotate(540deg) scale(1.5)}100%{transform:rotate(720deg) scale(1)}}';document.head.appendChild(style);document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(function(img){var dur=(Math.random()*3+1).toFixed(1);var delay=(Math.random()*2).toFixed(1);img.style.animation='wacky '+dur+'s '+delay+'s infinite';img.style.cursor='pointer';img.onclick=function(){this.style.animation='none';};});window._spinOn=true;alert('All images are now spinning! Click to stop again.');})();

name: Floating Balloons
description: Launches continuous drifting helium balloons from the bottom of the screen bounds.

name: Cosmic Starfield
description: Draws a moving canvas backdrop array of sparkling custom stellar constellations behind text.

name: Drama Masks
description: Wraps page paragraph lines random comedic quotes and stylized quote notation strings.

name: Melting Layout
description: Applies a slow downward CSS translate deformation rule tricking you into thinking elements are dripping.

name: Chime Symphony
description: Triggers clean synth sound audio frequencies mapped to every letter typed on your device.

name: Fortune Teller
description: Click anywhere to prompt a random magic eight ball response toast notification box popup.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){var answers=['It is certain','Reply hazy, try again','Don\'t count on it','Outlook good','My sources say no','Signs point to yes','Concentrate and ask again'];document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var t=document.createElement('div');t.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:'+e.clientX+'px;top:'+e.clientY+'px;background:#000;color:#fff;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:12px;z-index:99999;border:2px solid #7c3aed;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:12px;pointer-events:none;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);';t.textContent='🔮 '+answers[Math.floor(Math.random()*answers.length)];document.body.appendChild(t);setTimeout(function(){t.remove();},2000);},{once:false});alert('Click anywhere for a fortune!');})();

name: Card Flip View
description: Causes all layout components to rotate completely backwards on mouse hover events.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){var style=document.createElement('style');style.textContent='*:hover { transform: rotateY(180deg); transition: transform 0.5s; }';document.head.appendChild(style);alert('Card Flip Active!');})();

name: Circus Lights
description: Blinks all page borders with vibrant yellow and crimson pixel dashed indicators.

name: Sparkle Brush
description: Spawns small shining crystal diamond decals tracking your mouse path across the screen view.

name: Jurassic Roar
description: Plays a high fidelity synthesis dinosaur audio file through the browser speaker arrays.

name: Cat Paws Tracker
description: Leaves behind little animal footprint graphic decals behind your active viewport cursor actions.

name: Popcorn Burst
description: Makes small kernels bounce erratically around your application content frames.

name: Pixel Castle Theme
description: Overlays an elegant retro 8-bit stone grid styling ruleset directly over main containers.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='* { background: #475569 !important; color: #cbd5e1 !important; border: 4px solid #1e293b !important; font-family: "Courier New", monospace !important; border-radius: 0px !important; }';document.head.appendChild(s);})();

name: UFO Beam Overlay
description: Projects moving green translucent vertical light channels mimicking alien tractor beam arrays.

name: Lucky Clovers
description: Floods the active site layout header trees with glowing neon shamrock emojis.

name: Windows Error Spam
description: Floods the screen with 100 fake Windows XP style error popups. Each one has an OK button to close it.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){for(let i=0;i<100;i++){const e=document.createElement('div');e.style.position='fixed';e.style.top=Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+'%';e.style.left=Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+'%';e.style.width='220px';e.style.backgroundColor='#cbd5e1';e.style.border='2px solid #fff';e.style.boxShadow='2px 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),inset -1px -1px #888,inset 1px 1px #fff';e.style.fontFamily='Arial,sans-serif';e.style.fontSize='11px';e.style.zIndex=999999+i;e.style.userSelect='none';e.style.padding='2px';const t=document.createElement('div');t.style.backgroundColor='#000080';t.style.color='#fff';t.style.padding='2px 4px';t.style.fontWeight='bold';t.style.display='flex';t.style.justifyContent='space-between';t.innerText='Error '+(i+1);e.appendChild(t);const n=document.createElement('div');n.style.padding='10px 8px';n.style.color='#000';n.innerText='Fatal Exception has occurred.';e.appendChild(n);const o=document.createElement('div');o.style.textAlign='center';o.style.paddingBottom='8px';const l=document.createElement('button');l.innerText='OK';l.style.width='50px';l.style.fontSize='10px';l.style.backgroundColor='#cbd5e1';l.style.border='1px solid #000';l.style.cursor='pointer';l.onclick=function(){e.remove();};o.appendChild(l);e.appendChild(o);document.body.appendChild(e);}})();

name: Ant Infestation
description: Spawns 50 realistic tiny black ant dots crawling randomly all over text structures.

name: Fake Lag Engine
description: Deliberately slows click response times via blocking system calculations to simulate performance drops.

name: Rickroll Redirect
description: Silently remaps every outbound navigation hyperlink to targeted vintage music clips.

name: Ghost Whispers
description: Plays faint high pitch radio signal tones at randomized, completely unpredictable intervals.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){var ctx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();setInterval(function(){if(Math.random()>0.5){var osc=ctx.createOscillator();var gain=ctx.createGain();osc.type='sine';osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(Math.random()*2000+4000,ctx.currentTime);gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.02,ctx.currentTime);osc.connect(gain);gain.connect(ctx.destination);osc.start();osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+0.5);}},3000);alert('Whisper matrix executing in background...');})();

description: Launches a rapid succession of funny alerts asking confirmation to close browser windows.

javascript:(function(){var o=document.createElement('div');o.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:red;color:white;z-index:999999;font-family:sans-serif;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;padding-top:20%;font-size:30px;';o.innerHTML='🚨 MANDATORY DOMAIN ADVISORY 🚨

THIS DEVICE IS UNDER INVESTIGATION BY RECONNAISSANCE PROTOCOLS.';document.body.appendChild(o);o.onclick=function(){o.remove();};})();

javascript:(function(){var b=document.createElement('div');b.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:20px;right:20px;background:#fff;color:#000;border:2px solid red;padding:15px;z-index:999999;font-family:sans-serif;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);';b.innerHTML='SYSTEM CRITICAL
Battery level dropped to 1%. Performance throttled.';document.body.appendChild(b);setTimeout(function(){b.remove();},5000);})();

name: Word Matrix Counter

name: Secret Admin Tool
description: Only visible after entering the code.
bookmarklet: javascript:(function(){if(document.getElementById('bml-game-save-panel'))return;var p=document.createElement('div');p.id='bml-game-save-panel';p.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:20px;right:20px;background:#1a1a1a;color:#fff;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;z-index:999999;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);font-family:sans-serif;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;cursor:move;border:1px solid #333;';var s=document.createElement('button');s.textContent='💾 Save Game Data';s.style.cssText='padding:6px 12px;border:none;border-radius:4px;background:#4CAF50;color:white;cursor:pointer;font-weight:bold;';var l=document.createElement('button');l.textContent='📂 Load Game Data';l.style.cssText='padding:6px 12px;border:none;border-radius:4px;background:#2196F3;color:white;cursor:pointer;font-weight:bold;';var c=document.createElement('button');c.textContent='✕';c.style.cssText='background:transparent;border:none;color:#aaa;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;margin-left:5px;';p.appendChild(s);p.appendChild(l);p.appendChild(c);document.body.appendChild(p);s.onclick=function(){var d={};for(var i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){var k=localStorage.key(i);d[k]=localStorage.getItem(k);}var b=new Blob([JSON.stringify(d)],{type:'application/json'});var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(b);a.download=document.title.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,'_').toLowerCase()+'_save.json';a.click();alert('Gun Spin data exported successfully!');};l.onclick=function(){var i=document.createElement('input');i.type='file';i.accept='.json';i.onchange=e=>{var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{try{var d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);for(var k in d){localStorage.setItem(k,d[k]);}alert('Data loaded successfully! Restarting Gun Spin...');location.reload();}catch(err){alert('Error reading save file. Make sure it is the correct .json file.');}};r.readAsText(f);};i.click();};c.onclick=function(){p.remove();};var active=false,cX,cY,oX,oY;p.onmousedown=function(e){if(e.target.tagName==='BUTTON')return;active=true;cX=e.clientX;cY=e.clientY;var r=p.getBoundingClientRect();oX=r.left;oY=r.top;e.preventDefault();};document.onmousemove=function(e){if(!active)return;var nX=oX+(e.clientX-cX);var nY=oY+(e.clientY-cY);p.style.left=nX+'px';p.style.top=nY+'px';p.style.right='auto';};document.onmouseup=function(){active=false;};})();

name: Owner Information
description: Owner: CodexGaming Welcome to the owner section. This area can be customized with announcements, updates, or owner-only information.
